GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_DMBLVM_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. When this calibration is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_cRpL0Dw5EeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_PHONE_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. When this calibration is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen.GIS-501_Upt7sDw6EeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     true
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_NAV_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. Note: The first/overriding condition for determining if this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen is the value of NAV feature calibration (ENABLE_APPLICATION_NAVIGATION). When the value of the ENABLE_APPLICATION_NAVIGATION is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen no matter what the value of this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_NAV_ENABLED) is set to. When the ENABLE_APPLICATION_NAVIGATION is set to True, the value of the APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_NAV_ENABLED calibration is then used as the next/secondary condition for determining if this HomeScreeHomeScreen Appliation shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_NAV_ENABLED) is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen.GIS-501_VGwAgDw7EeaGEeA8k3J6-w4Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_NAVLVM_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. When this calibration is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_wQpP4DxEEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_CLIMATE_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. Note: The first/overriding condition for determining if this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen is the value of the Climate feature calibration (HvacRadioDisplayEnable for Global A or Climate Application Available for Global B ). When the value of the HvacRadioDisplayEnable (Global A specific calibration) or Climate Application Available (Global B specific calibration) is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen no matter what the value of this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_CLIMATE_ENABLED) is set to. When the HvacRadioDisplayEnable (Global A specific calibration) or Climate Application Available (Global B specific calibration) is set to True, the value of the APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_CLIMATE_ENABLED calibration is then used as the next/secondary condition for determining if this HomeScreeHomeScreen Appliation shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_CLIMATE_ENABLED) is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_RBdakDxFEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     true
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_USERS_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. When this calibration is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_8jazoDxFEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     true
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_SETTINGS_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. When this calibration is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_dVkbEDxGEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     true
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_APPLECARPLAY_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. Note: The first/overriding condition for determining if this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen is the value of AppleCarPlay feature calibration (Enable_Application_Apple_Carplay). When the value of the Enable_Application_Apple_Carplay is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen no matter what the value of this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_APPLECARPLAY_ENABLED) is set to. When the Enable_Application_Apple_Carplay is set to True, the value of the APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_APPLECARPLAY_ENABLED calibration is then used as the next/secondary condition for determining if this HomeScreeHomeScreen Appliation shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_APPLECARPLAY_ENABLED) is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen.GIS-501_WLXowDxHEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     true
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_MIRRORLINK_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. Note: The first/overriding condition for determining if this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen is the value of MirrorLink feature calibration (Enable_Application_MirrorLink). When the value of the Enable_Application_MirrorLink is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen no matter what the value of this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_MIRRORLINK_ENABLED) is set to. When the Enable_Application_MirrorLink is set to True, the value of the APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_MIRRORLINK_ENABLED calibration is then used as the next/secondary condition for determining if this HomeScreeHomeScreen Appliation shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_MIRRORLINK_ENABLED) is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen.GIS-501_xeCBUDxKEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_ANDROIDAUTO_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. Note: The first/overriding condition for determining if this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen is the value of ANDROIDAUTO feature calibration (Enable_application_google_Automotive_link). When the value of the Enable_application_google_Automotive_link is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen no matter what the value of this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_ANDROIDAUTO_ENABLED) is set to. When the Enable_application_google_Automotive_link is set to True, the value of the APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_ANDROIDAUTO_ENABLED calibration is then used as the next/secondary condition for determining if this HomeScreeHomeScreen Appliation shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_ANDROIDAUTO_ENABLED) is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen.GIS-501_uszTADxOEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     true
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_BAIDUCARLIFE_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. Note: The first/overriding condition for determining if this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen is the value of BAIDUCARLIFE feature calibration (ENABLE_APPLICATIONBAIDU_CARLIFE). When the value of the ENABLE_APPLICATIONBAIDU_CARLIFE is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen no matter what the value of this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_BAIDUCARLIFE_ENABLED) is set to. When the ENABLE_APPLICATIONBAIDU_CARLIFE is set to True, the value of the APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_BAIDUCARLIFE_ENABLED calibration is then used as the next/secondary condition for determining if this HomeScreeHomeScreen Appliation shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_BAIDUCARLIFE_ENABLED) is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen.GIS-501_ng_sQDxREeaGEeA8k3J6-w4Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_APPSHOP_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. When this calibration is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_KiaAkDxSEeaGEeA8k3J6-w4Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_ENERGY_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. When this calibration is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_vasW8DxSEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_CUSTOMMODE_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. When this calibration is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_abJlcDxTEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_ONSTAR_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. When this calibration is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen.GIS-501_Hwhc4DxUEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     true
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_PDRLVM_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. Note: The first/overriding condition for determining if this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen is the value of any of the PDR related calibrations (LVM_1, LVM_2, or LVM_3). If the value of none of the PDR related calibrations (LVM_1, LVM_2, or LVM_3) is set to a value other than LVM_PERFORMANCE_COMPUTER, this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen no matter what the value of this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_PDRLVM_ENABLED) is set to. If at least one of the PDR related calibrations (LVM_1, LVM_2, or LVM_3) is set to a value of LVM_PERFORMANCE_COMPUTER, then the value of the APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_PDRLVM_ENABLED calibration is then used as the next/secondary condition for determining if this HomeScreeHomeScreen Appliation shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_PDRLVM_ENABLED) is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen.GIS-501_iFSrADxxEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_VIDEO_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. When this calibration is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_Lqa0sDxWEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_REARCLIMATE_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. Note: The first/overriding condition for determining if this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen is the value of the RearClimate feature calibration (RearHvacRadioDisplayEnable for Global A or Rear_Climate_Application_Available for Global B ). When the value of the RearHvacRadioDisplayEnable (Global A specific calibration) or Rear_Climate_Application_Available (Global B specific calibration) is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen no matter what the value of this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_REARCLIMATE_ENABLED) is set to. When the RearHvacRadioDisplayEnable (Global A specific calibration) or Rear_Climate_Application_Available (Global B specific calibration) is set to True, the value of the APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_REARCLIMATE_ENABLED calibration is then used as the next/secondary condition for determining if this HomeScreeHomeScreen Appliation shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_REARCLIMATE_ENABLED) is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_pC-6QDyPEeaGEeA8k3J6-w4Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_INTERIORLIGHTING_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. Note: The first/overriding condition for determining if this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen is the value of Interior/Ambient lighting feature calibration (AmbientLightingEnable). When the value of the AmbientLightingEnable is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen no matter what the value of this calibration (ENABLE_APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_INTERIOR_ENABLED) is set to. When the AmbientLightingEnable is set to True, the value of the APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_INTERIORLIGHTING_ENABLED calibration is then used as the next/secondary condition for determining if this HomeScreeHomeScreen Appliation shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_INTERIORLIGHTING_ENDABLED) is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_FKW1oDyFEeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_VIDEORECORDERLVM_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. When this calibration is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_Mes-0Dz6EeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     false
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAPPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_CAMERALVM_ENABLEDLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is used to Enable/Disable the display of this Application on the HomeScreen and in the App Tray. Note: The first/overriding condition for determining if this VPM Camera HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen is the value of VPM present configured calibration (RVS_PRESENT_STATUS). If the value of the VPM present configured calibration (RVS_PRESENT_STATUS) is set to a value other than PRESENT_VPM_CAMERA_PROCESSING_MODULE, this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen no matter what the value of this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_CAMERALVM_ENABLED) is set to. If the VPM present configured calibration (RVS_PRESENT_STATUS) is set to a value of PRESENT_VPM_CAMERA_PROCESSING_MODULE, then the value of the APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_CAMERALVM_ENABLED calibration is then used as the next/secondary condition for determining if this HomeScreeHomeScreen Appliation shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration (APPLICATION_HOMESCREEN_CAMERALVM_ENABLED) is set to True (Enabled), this HomeScreen Application shall be displayed on the HomeScreen. When this calibration is set to False (Disabled), this HomeScreen Application shall not be displayed on the HomeScreen. GIS-501_MFSHUDz8EeaGEeA8k3J6-w3Boolean     false

GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAppTray_ApplicationOrdering11MID,HIGH,VCU,GLOBALA,GLOBALBApplication 11 on the App TrayGIS501 Section5.1.1.1_jaWIAQTLEeuhM_xpS7qcsA1Enumeration     RearClimate
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefAppTray_ApplicationOrdering12MID,HIGH,VCU,GLOBALA,GLOBALBApplication 12 on the App TrayGIS501 Section5.1.1.1_gaGDEQTLEeuhM_xpS7qcsA1Enumeration     APA
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefDefaultNumOfPagesLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis cal is unbounded but with a default of 1. The number of pages that are available to the user to put applications on is based on this calibration. _06xe0MTEEeOEzdA9o_rOxw4Integer 11001.0none10
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefNavigation_Zone_EnabledMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUThis calibration enables or disables the navigation zone in the Porch ViewGIS501 5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_reXS4GkUEeSgh9VY6ZvAyA3Boolean     true
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefPorch_View_EnabledLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration enables or disables the porch view. When disabled, the porch view is not accessible and is not indicated as a page in the page indicators.GIS501 5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_sIt3cGkUEeSgh9VY6ZvAyA2Boolean     true
GIS501_HomeScreenUI.caldefEditingHomeScreenDriverWorkloadLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUWhen the user performs a long press on a home screen icon, the lockout popup is shown indicating that they cannot edit the icons. When the lockout pop-up is dismissed, the user is taken back to the home screen that they were on before.GIS501 5.5.1.1*MY17 Driver Workload Restriction Items_JOIXALisEeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDAB_EPG_LengthEventDescriptionDetailedViewInParkingModeLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCU Defines number of characters to show in parking mode.GIS-502_gP7QkJlSEea-Ao5FQchwtQ3Enumeration     Off_Only_List_View_Long_180_Chars
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDAB_EPG_LengthEventDescriptionDetailedViewInDrivingModeLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDefines number of characters to show in driving mode.GIS-502_xosIoJlREea-Ao5FQchwtQ3Enumeration     Off_Only_List_View_Short_180_Chars
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefAlbum_Art_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Album_Art_Menu_Item_On calibration defines the HMI menu item default state for Album Art. When TRUE, Album Art images are displayed. When FALSE, Album Art images are not displayed. The default setting is TRUE. (On)GIS-502 4.1.28.2, 4.1.28.3_UK-wwblJEeSMLcx9-dghJQ3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefAudio_Now_Playing_LayoutLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Audio_Now_Playing_Layout calibration defines the now playing screen layout for a region. When TRUE, display the North American layout. When FALSE, display the other region layout. The default setting is always true for North America. Other regions will set the desired state using a cal override.GIS-502-4.1.3.3, 4.1.3.4, 4.1.3.18_GKlEQN08EeSvBMdbuIN9qg3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefCategoriesByRegionLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUCategoriesByRegion controls when categories will be shown for stations in the FM band. When True, display the Categories and associated stations in the HMI Display. When False, do not display the Categories and associated stations in the HMI Display. The default state is True. Note: The tuner cal FM_RDS_PTY_enabled must also be set to True to enable Categories.GIS-502 _uPQegTDhEeaCKJy9kX4aow3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDAB_Announcement_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe DAB_Announcement_Menu_Item_On calibration defines the HMI menu item default state for DAB Announcements. When TRUE, DAB Announcements are enabled. When FALSE, DAB Announcements are disabled. The default setting is TRUE. (On)GIS-502 4.1.28.2_GYHVod4bEeSfuIbaAz9ajg3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDAB_DAB_Linking_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe DAB_DAB_Linking_Menu_Item_On calibration defines the HMI menu item default state for DAB to DAB Linking. When TRUE, DAB to DAB linking is enabled. When FALSE, DAB to DAB linking is disabled. The default setting is TRUE. (On)GIS-502 4.1.28.3_9wjGEd4eEeSfuIbaAz9ajg3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDAB_DisplayDABCategoriesLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDAB_DisplayDABCategories cal defines whether the DAB category menu item (and associated DAB stations) should be displayed for DAB stations in a specific region. True means display a DAB category and any associated stations. False means do not display the DAB category as DAB stations cannot be accurately defined or should not be displayed for a given region. The default value is True. The tuner shall also monitor this cal and provide appropriate action to either support or not support the processing of this feature based on the cal setting. This helps balance and optimize system resources based on required features for a given market. When True, show DAB_DisplayDABCategories. When False, do not show DAB_DisplayDABCategories.GIS-502_Ea5MgTDdEeaCKJy9kX4aow3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDAB_FM_Linking_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe DAB_FM_Linking_Menu_Item_On calibration defines the HMI menu item default state for DAB to FM Linking. When TRUE, DAB to FM linking is enabled. When FALSE, DAB to FM linking is disabled. The default setting is TRUE. (On)GIS-502-4.1.28.2_4Jm3Ad6zEeSfuIbaAz9ajg3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDAB_RDS_TuningLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUIf the station cannot be acquired after 2s the DAB/RDS tuning message will be shown in the metadataGIS-502-4.2.10.6, 4.1.14.6_X67cwGlGEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Integer 251.0seconds2
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDAB_Slide_Show_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDAB_Slide_Show_Menu_Item_On calibration defines the HMI menu item default state for DAB slide show images. When True, DAB slide show images are displayed. When False, DAB slide show images are not shown and the static default image is shown.GIS-502_HWFgYTDfEeaCKJy9kX4aow3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDAB_Source_ModeLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration determines if the DAB source mode icon will be displayed as a source in the radio screen. The default value is FALSE which means do not display the Source Mode icon.GIS-502 4.1.3.4_EyCukd09EeSvBMdbuIN9qg3Boolean     false
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDAB_Station_Not_AvailableLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe DAB_Station_Not_Available calibration is a timer used to delay the display of the DAB Station Not Available message in cases where the DAB signal drops below an acceptable receive signal threshold in the tuner. While the timer is active (i.e., not expired) HMI shall continue to display the current metadata for the existing broadcast even if the signal is lost and audio is now longer present. This prevents undesirable toggling of DAB HMI messages (i.e., metadata) should the DAB signal be intermittent. Once the timer expires, HMI shall display the DAB Station Not Available message if the current DAB station signal strength does not return to an acceptable receive threshold.GIS-502-4.1.21.6_YeMfMd-lEeSfuIbaAz9ajg3Integer 0151.0seconds5
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDeviceFriendlyNameLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Device friendly name will be shown for 2s after sourcing before being populated with metadata.GIS-502-4.1.3.8_CbfqQGlHEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Integer 251.0seconds3
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDirectTuneLockoutLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUWhen enabled the user will no longer be able to launch direct tune. This item will appear grayed out and when selected the user will get the quick notice action unavailable while driving. Should user be in direct tune window when this calibration is enabled the user will be presented with the notification action unavailable while driving and when this notification is dismissed the user will be returned to the now playing screen.GIS-502 6.4_itkrkN4BEeW58O1OdVks4w3Enumeration     NotParkedTeen
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDirectTuneSXMLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUAfter an valid frequency in SXM the radio will tune after 2500 ms without a GO pressGIS-502-4.1.16_xnI8QGlGEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Integer 200050001.0milliseconds2500
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefDirectTuneSXMMessageLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUChannel Unavailable and other messages will be shown for 2s in the metadata/ Channels not broadcast will have same behaviorGIS-502-4.1.16.6_x3mycGlMEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Integer 251.0seconds2
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefExplicit_Content_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Explicit_Content_Menu_Item_On calibration defines the default HMI menu state for SXM explicit channel filtering. When set to (TRUE) explicit content is filtered as determined by the explicit content filter flag in the X65 module. When FALSE, explicit channels are not filtered. The default state for this calibration is FALSE (Off). This means all SXM channels shall be shown with no explicit channel filtering. When TRUE, HMI shall not allow explicit channels to be tuned.GIS-502 6.1.1.1_QI7igblHEeSMLcx9-dghJQ3Boolean     false
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefFAVDelayLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUAfter a press of the FAV+ or FAV- buttons, there is a delay of 1100ms before the broadcast audio favorite is selected and the source begins playing.GIS-502-6.1.1.1_U4S8wGlHEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Integer 50020001.0milliseconds1100
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefFAVWidgetRemovalLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Favorite Widget will auto-dismiss after 3 seconds of inactivity with the FAV+ or FAV- buttons.GIS-502-5.7.3.15_ezYs4GlHEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Integer 261.0seconds3
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefFMStationListViewSortLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration defines the sort parameter for the FM Station List view. This cal is defined as an enumeration with the option to sort by PI, PSN, or frequency. The default value for this cal is PI code for EU markets.GIS-502-4.1.20.10_WyZ8kN7FEeSfuIbaAz9ajg3Enumeration     SortByPICode
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefFastForwardLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUPress and hold the media will FF at a rate of 10x normal playbackGIS-502 4.1.14.13_c0ECgLXnEeOEzdA9o_rOxw3Integer 5201.0none10
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefFastRewindLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUPress and hold the media will REW at a rate of 10x the normal playbackGIS-502 4.1.14.14_oeTvgGlGEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Integer 5201.0none10
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefHDMulticastMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUHD will hold the metadata for 15s before showing the HD acquiring signal message after message is lostGIS-502-4.1.32_RvorwLXnEeOEzdA9o_rOxw3Integer 5201.0seconds15
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefHD_Radio_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe HD_Radio_Menu_Item_On determines the HMI menu default state (HD On or HD Off) when HD Radio is activated in the tuner. If HD Radio is not active in the tuner, the state of this calibration shall be set to FALSE via a cal override. The default state for this calibration is TRUE (On). This means the HMI menu item default setting for HD Radio is "ON" and the user can select and listen to HD stations and see the HD icon/metadata in the now playing screen and the station list view. When set to OFF, HD Radio is disabled and therefore the tuner will not process HD stations. In addition, the user will not see the HD icon and associated metadata in the now playing screen and the station list view.GIS-502 4.1.28.1_LfgVwblGEeSMLcx9-dghJQ3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefHD_Radio_Multicast_TuningMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUIf tuning to a multicast station takes longer than 250ms (default) the tuning message will be shown in the metadata.GIS-502_LGMcUTDcEeaCKJy9kX4aow2Integer 010001.0milliseconds250
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefInstant_Replay_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Instant_Replay_Menu_Item_On calibration defines the HMI menu item default state for the SXM Instant Replay feature. When TRUE, Instant Replay is enabled. When FALSE, Instant Replay is disabled. The default setting is TRUE. (On)GIS-502-4.1.28.1_r-wF4d7CEeSfuIbaAz9ajg3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefHUDAudioUpdateMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen the driver interacts with Steering Wheel controls and changes the Audio Information displayed in the cluster, the audio information is also temporarily displayed in the HUD. When the driver stops interacting with the steering wheel control for 5 seconds, the HUD reverts to the previously displayed HUD page.GIS-502-6.1.1.1_IueZUGlJEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Integer 2101.0seconds5
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefMediaBrowseLockOutLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUFor the enumerated value selected, the feature is locked out when the enumerated state is TRUE and for all enumerated states greater that the selected default.GIS-502-6.4_7vwOgL1aEeSOH7Idfz1A2w3Enumeration     NotParkedTeen
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefMetadataCorrectorMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUMetadataCorrector cal- Based on presence of metadata corrector service. If true, show meta- data corrector in settings. If False, do not show metadata corrector in settings.GIS-502 _Ij8lMTDgEeaCKJy9kX4aow2Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefMetadataCorrectorLogoMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUThe Length of time to show the metadata corrector logo in the now playing and list view screensGIS-502-4.2.5.1_LzDPgGlHEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Integer 251.0seconds3
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefMetadataCorrector_Menu_Item_OnMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen the MetadataCorrector calibration is set to TRUE, the MetadataCorrector_Menu_Item_On calibration shall be used to set the default state for the feature in the HMI menu. When TRUE, the metadata corrector function shall be active. When FALSE, the metadata corrector function shall be inactive. The default state for this cal is FALSE. This cal is not valid if the MetadataCorrector cal is set to FALSE.GIS-502 4.1.28.1, 4.1.28.2, 4.1.28.3_LvV2oblIEeSMLcx9-dghJQ2Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefMetadata_Paging_RateLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Metadata_Paging_Rate calibration controls the paging rate of metadata when the metadata does not fit within the defined HMI metadata field size. The default value is 5 seconds. This means when paged metadata is available, each page displays for 5 seconds before moving to the next page of metadata.GIS-502 4.1.3_BhMVsblKEeSMLcx9-dghJQ3Integer 2201.0seconds5
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefRDS_Radio_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe RDS_Radio_Menu_Item_On determines the HMI menu default state (RDS Info On/Off) when RDS is active in the tuner. If RDS is not active in the tuner, this calibration is not used. The default state for this calibration is TRUE (On). This means the HMI menu item default setting for RDS is "ON" and RDS information is displayed for the currently tuned station. When set to OFF, RDS information is not displayed for the currently tuned station.GIS-502 6.1.1.1_w-9rwLlEEeSMLcx9-dghJQ3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefRDS_PTY_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration is required to support RDS regulatory requirements in certain markets. The RDS_PTY_Menu_Item_On determines the HMI menu default state (RDS PTY On/Off) when FM_RDS_PTY_enabled is activated in the tuner. If FM_RDS_PTY_enabled is not active in the tuner, the state of this calibration shall be set to FALSE. The default state for this calibration is FALSE(Off). This means the HMI menu item default setting for RDS PTY is "OFF" and the user will not see RDS PTY (categories) information. When the cal is TRUE (ON), RDS PTY (categories) will be displayed. _B5zXYJKhEem0sOY-d8MlZA1Boolean     false
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefRegion_Setting_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Region_Setting_Menu_Item_On determines the HMI menu default state (Region Setting On or Off) for markets that support this FM feature. The default state for this calibration is TRUE (On). This means the HMI menu item default setting for Region setting is On and the tuner shall support Region switching where available. When set to OFF, Region switching will not be active in the tuner even in areas that support the feature.GIS-502-4.1.28.2_TGpnEd7GEeSfuIbaAz9ajg3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefSXM_Source_ModeLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration determines if the SXM source mode icon will be displayed as a source in the radio screen. The default value is TRUE which means display the Source Mode icon.GIS-502-4.1.3.5_1UgdwblGEeSMLcx9-dghJQ3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefSet_Number_Display_FavoritesLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration provides an HMI menu selection of values the user can select to define the quantity of favorites to be displayed. The default state is AUTO (e.g., quantity limited by Infotainment System)GIS-502 4.1.31.8_MkVLoLlNEeSMLcx9-dghJQ3Enumeration     Auto
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefSlideShow_Alpha_BlendLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUFor the transition between the slides a blending (alpha-blend of 1.5s (calibratable)) that can be calibrated. The DAB tuner internally buffers the slides to achieve the calibrated interval. A special case of 0 seconds is defined to indicate that no transition interval shall be applied (i.e., transition immediately from one slide to the next).GIS-502-4.1.68.1*MY18 Slideshow_AIaXcNK9EeS7moXKCsUKKg3Integer 050001.0milliseconds1500
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefSlideShow_TimeOutLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUIn case of a DAB signal loss, the DAB Band default image will be shown after a timeout of 10 min (calibratable by SlideShow_TimeOut).GIS-502-4.1.68.5*MY18 Slideshow unavailable_5uZ2gNK-EeS7moXKCsUKKg3Integer 5201.0seconds15
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefSlideshow_AlbumArt_LockOutLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUFor the enumerated value selected, the feature is locked out when the enumerated state is TRUE and for all enumerated states greater that the selected default.GIS-502-6.4_AHqNcL1cEeSOH7Idfz1A2w3Enumeration     NotParkedTeen
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefSlideshow_DAB_Band_Image_Display_TimeLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUTo provide a consistent user experience, the HMI module shall always display the DAB band image for a 2 second period (calibrateable) after the user selects a DAB channel, even if HMI has received the DAB Album Art.GIS-502-4.1.68*MY18 Dab Album Art/Slideshow_Ncc5ANLAEeS7moXKCsUKKg3Integer 100050001.0milliseconds2000
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefSplashscreensMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUThe splash screen shall be shown for the time defined in this calibration when the 3rdPartyAppLaunchTime timer expires. This calibration only apply in the presence of 3rd Party Apps. The default rate of this calibration is 2500ms.GIS-502-4.2.14.9_65bnAGlGEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Integer 150050001.0milliseconds2500
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefSports_Flash_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Sports_Flash_Menu_Item_On calibration defines the HMI menu item default state for SXM Sports Flash feature. When TRUE, Sports Flash is enabled. When FALSE, Sports Flash is disabled. The default setting is TRUE. (On)GIS-502-4.1.72_uao5gd7CEeSfuIbaAz9ajg3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefStationChannelListLockOutLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUFor the enumerated value selected, the feature is locked out when the enumerated state is TRUE and for all enumerated states greater that the selected default.GIS-502-6.4_VKkcAL1bEeSOH7Idfz1A2w3Enumeration     NotParkedTeen
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefThirdPartyAppLaunchTimeMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCU3rd Party Apps that take longer than this cal time to load will require a splash screen to be shown. Splash screens should be shown for at least default value selected in the SplashScreen cal. The default value for this calibration is 1500 msec.GIS-502-4.2.14.9_HEVXYb0qEeS9WKKVTwo_cg3Integer 100050001.0milliseconds1500
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefToneSettingsLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUPress and hold on up/down for tone settings will increase or decrease the value at a slew rate of 3 values per secondGIS-502-4.1.29_PK0loLXnEeOEzdA9o_rOxw3Integer 251.0none3
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefTraffic_Information_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Traffic_Information_Menu_Item_On calibration defines the HMI menu item default state for Traffic Information in Japan. When TRUE, Traffic Information is enabled. When FALSE, Traffic Information is disabled. The default setting is False (Off).GIS-502 4.1.28.3_4zhOgd7mEeSfuIbaAz9ajg3Boolean     false
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefTraffic_Program_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Traffic_Program_Menu_Item_On calibration defines the HMI menu item default state for Traffic Program Announcements. When TRUE, Traffic Program Announcements are enabled. When FALSE, Traffic Program Announcements are disabled. The default setting is TRUE. (On)GIS-502 4.1.28.2_Z3Sm8d4iEeSfuIbaAz9ajg3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefTune_Start_Menu_Item_OnLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Tune_Start_Menu_Item_On calibration defines the HMI menu item default state for the SXM Tune Start feature. When TRUE, Tune Start is enabled. When FALSE, Tune Start is disabled. The default setting is TRUE. (On)GIS-502-4.1.28.1_nXXEAd7CEeSfuIbaAz9ajg3Boolean     true
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefVideoInParkTimeoutLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUControls will timeout to non reveal state 15s after last interactionGIS-502 6.4_Lsl-AGlOEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Integer 5201.0seconds15
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefVideoLockOutMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUFor the enumerated value selected, the feature is locked out when the enumerated state is TRUE and for enumerated states greater that the selected default.GIS-502-6.4_jLF7AL1cEeSOH7Idfz1A2w3Enumeration     VehicleStopped
GIS502_TunerHMI.caldefZoomBubbleLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUZoom bubble will remain up for 1000ms after the user stops interacting with the scroll barGIS-502-4.2.7_Ne0W0LXnEeOEzdA9o_rOxw3Integer 50020001.0milliseconds1000
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefMAX_NUMBER_OF_PHONES_CONNECTEDMID,HIGH,GLOBALB,VCUThis calibration only applies to Android P or later (Info 3.7 and beyond), capable of supporting Dual Phone mode. Dual Phone Mode allows up to two (2) outgoing phones to connect to the system. The user has the ability to deactivate Dual Phone mode. Deactivating Dual Phone mode will only allow one phone to be connected to the system. The Phones UI will vary depending on the setting chosen by the user. This calibration will be used to define whether the Dual Phone Mode UI will be displayed, or single phone mode UI will be displayed to the user. GIS-503 Section 5.1.1.2_XT5lsE_rEemw0OEy2xt-jw1Integer 121.0none2
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefIGN_OFF_TRANSFER_CALL_SCREENLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUSets the time delay before a Call Transfer screen is shown when turning off vehicle while on active call.GIS-503 5.1.1.1* Calibration Items_mLZcUONHEeayQ7dTF1k6LA3Integer 0101.0seconds0
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefDefaultPrefferedPhonebookSortOrderLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration determines the default phonebook sorting order. Even though language is the primary factor that influences the phonebook sort order, to clarify complexity, this calibration applies to all langauges that are currently enabled. Factory default sort order will apply to all available languages within a specific vehicle configuration.GIS-503 5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_wLolUG7dEeSssq_awwoZ3g3Enumeration     FirstNamePreferredSortorder
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefEnablePhoneAutoCompleteLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUAs the user is entering digits, the number is auto completed based upon matches to the recent call history. If there are multiple matches, the match shown is based upon the most recent date. The digits entered by the user will be shown visually different from the auto entry numbers. The user continues entering digits if the autocomplete phone number is not the desired phone number. The autocomplete is available when the user is not in a call or is in the add call mode.GIS-503 5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_-fHSAG7dEeSssq_awwoZ3g3Boolean     true
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefEnablePhoneStatusRegionRoamingIndicatorLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUAn icon will be displayed when the Bluetooth device is roaming.GIS-503 5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_NPD4QG7eEeSssq_awwoZ3g3Boolean     true
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefEnableVoicemailViewButtonLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUVoicemail is a regional requirement. $00 - disable for China applications $01 - enabled for all non-China applicationsGIS-503 5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_QvsGYG7eEeSssq_awwoZ3g3Boolean     true
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefSleepFaultTimeOutLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUTimeout value to prevent a battery drain in the event of a software fault that prevents the system from going to Sleep. GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefActiveCallViewSettingLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUSets default value for allowing the user to toggle on or off if incoming calls to appear in the ICS and IPC or IPC onlyGIS503_rJoSwN8lEeSAdoeK2ksMLw3Boolean     true
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefPrePayModeLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCURegionally dependent sets the user to either pre_pay or post_pay mode. In post-pay mode the user will not have minutes remaining displayed for OnStar Calls.GIS503_twoKMN8lEeSAdoeK2ksMLw3Boolean     false
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefPrivacySettingLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALBAllows user to toggle on or off if incoming call alerts will be shown in the cluster and centrestack or just the cluster.Gis503_vIyP8N8lEeSAdoeK2ksMLw3Boolean     false
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefCallEndedViewLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUSets value for how long call ended view will be shown after call has ended. Default value is 5sGIS-503 5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_d03O4AiXEeW9i8rzg7Ds1g3Integer 0105.0seconds1
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefActiveCallViewLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUSets value for how long after ignition off exiting vehicle pop up should be shown. Default value is 10s.GIS-503 5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_3jX0cAiXEeW9i8rzg7Ds1g3Integer 02010.0seconds1
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefRecentCallsListDriverWorkloadLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUWhen triggered, the user is limited to viewing a restricted number of recent call entries using the restricted list view template.GIS503 5.5.1.1*MY17 Driver Workload Restriction Items_rdIW8bisEeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefVirtualNumericKeypadDriverWorkloadLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUComprehended at widget level, when triggered, the feature restricted popup (GIS-500) is shown, and the virtual numeric keypad in the Keypad tab will need to be replaced with the workload restricted keypad (GIS-500).GIS503 5.5.1.1*MY17 Driver Workload Restriction Items_q9JPUbisEeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     NotParkedTeen

GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefVehicleContactEditingDriverWorkloadLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUWhen triggered, the Edit Contact selection on the OnStar Contacts view is greyed out. Pressing the Edit Contact button will show the feature restricted popup (see GIS- 00). If the user has already started the Edit Contact process and the driving mode lockout is then triggered, the process is cancelled, the feature restricted popup (GIS- 00) is shown, and the user is returned to the screen that initiated the Edit Contact process.GIS503 5.5.1.1*MY17 Driver Workload Restriction Items_qk35QbisEeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS503_PhoneDomain.caldefTtyEmergencyCallDriverWorkloadLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUTTY Lockout to be overridden during an Emergency Call. GIS503 5.5.1.1*MY17 Driver Workload Restriction Items_Nh4uYbiwEeSxl78x5qydAw4Enumeration     RestrictionsNA

GIS508_PersonalizationFBS.caldefProfileCreationSetupWizardDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen enabled, user is prohibited from going through the User profile setup wizard process. GIS508_PersonalizationFBS.caldefLast_Profile_EnableMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen enabled, the system will default to the last profile when no identifier is detected or assigned. GIS511_LVM.caldefLVM_3MID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUEach LVM application has a specific ID which is programmed in the LVM's non-volatile memory according to the features supported. This parameter, known as the LVMApplicationID, is used by the CSM to notify the LVM(s) of which LVM application is currently in use. The CSM requires an End of Line calibration providing details of which LVM applications are supported. GIS-511 5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items LVMEnableType_5vXKkEIhEeW1KJbfjB0QJg1Enumeration     LVM_DISABLED
GIS511_LVM.caldefLVM_2MID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUEach LVM application has a specific ID which is programmed in the LVM's non-volatile memory according to the features supported. This parameter, known as the LVMApplicationID, is used by the CSM to notify the LVM(s) of which LVM application is currently in use. The CSM requires an End of Line calibration providing details of which LVM applications are supported. GIS-511 5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items LVMEnableType_IRih8EIfEeW1KJbfjB0QJg1Enumeration     LVM_DISABLED
GIS511_LVM.caldefLVM_1MID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUEach LVM application has a specific ID which is programmed in the LVM's non-volatile memory according to the features supported. This parameter, known as the LVMApplicationID, is used by the CSM to notify the LVM(s) of which LVM application is currently in use. The CSM requires an End of Line calibration providing details of which LVM applications are supported. GIS-511_Lp4JAEIaEeW1KJbfjB0QJg1Enumeration     LVM_DISABLED

Range for this calibration is as follows:$1 = Enable and $0 = Disable (default value is $1)5.1.1.1*Calibration Items_NcFdYJ8AEea-Ao5FQchwtQ2Boolean     false

GIS512_Connections.caldefEnableBluetoothLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThese Calibrations are desired to be able to enable and disable a complete Bluetooth Profile and its related HMI.5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_1y_IAG7gEeSssq_awwoZ3g3Boolean     true
GIS512_Connections.caldefBluetoothModuleDeviceNameLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Bluetooth Module device name (user-friendly name) shall be based on the vehicle brand and model. The Bluetooth Module shall not allow changes of the device name. Starting MY18, possible Bluetooth friendly names are: Cadillac vehicles: myCadillac, Chevrolet vehicles: myChevrolet, Buick vehicles: myBuick, GMC vehicles: myGMC, Opel vehicles: myOpel, Vauxhall vehicles: myVauxhall, and Holden vehicles: myHolden 5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_-ofJEG7gEeSssq_awwoZ3g3String  100 UTF8myCadillac
GIS512_Connections.caldefEnablePhoneStatusRegionBatteryLevelLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUAn icon will be displayed to indicate the battery level. The icon will have six different states ranging from level 0 for minimum battery charge to level 5 for maximum battery charge5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_NFz9QGlaEeSUD4W2RgDvTg3Boolean     true
GIS512_Connections.caldefEnablePhoneStatusRegionSignalStrengthLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUAn icon will be displayed to indicate the signal strength. The icon will have six different states ranging from level 0 for no reception to level 5 for maximum reception.5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_QgHR8G7hEeSssq_awwoZ3g3Boolean     true
GIS512_Connections.caldefBTConnectionRequestTimerLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUIf a connection request is not received within 60sec, the Bluetooth Module shall send a notification to the HMI and exit the Pairing Process.5.1.1.1*MY17 Calibration Items_Z17KwG7hEeSssq_awwoZ3g3Integer 02551.0seconds60

GIS512_Connections.caldefNFCPairingDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUUser shall not be able to initiate Bluetooth pairing process by holding their device to NFC antenna while vehicle is in motion.GIS 512 5.5.1.1*Driver Workload Restriction Items_lh2uEJ8BEea-Ao5FQchwtQ2Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS512_Connections.caldefAddDeviceDriverWorkloadLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUWhen triggered, the Add Device selection on the Devices view is greyed out. Pressing the Add Device button will show the feature restricted pop-up (see GIS-500). If the user has already started the Add Device process and the driving mode lockout is then triggered, the process is cancelled, the feature restricted pop-up (GIS-500) is shown, and the user is returned to the screen that initiated the Add Device process.GIS 512 5.5.1.1*MY17 Driver Workload Restriction Items_-ZJ34bizEeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS512_Connections.caldefConnectingDeviceOverUSBDriverWorkloadLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUProjection devices connected over USB (not Wi-Fi / Wi-Fi Direct) will not be restricted by Lockout.GIS 512 5.5.1.1*MY17 Driver Workload Restriction Items_-HEpYbizEeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     RestrictionsNA
GIS512_Connections.caldefRenameDeviceDriverWorkloadLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUUser will not be able to enter the Keyboard view to rename device while vehicle is in motion.GIS 512 5.5.1.1*MY17 Driver Workload Restriction Items_99sD4bizEeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS512_Connections.caldefAddWiFiNetworkDriverWorkloadLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUWhen triggered, the Add Other Network selection on the Wi-Fi Networks view is greyed out. Pressing the Add Other Network button will show the feature restricted pop-up (see GIS-500). If the user has already started the Add Other Network process and the driving mode lockout is then triggered, the process is cancelled, the feature restricted pop-up (GIS- 500) is shown, and the user is returned to the screen that initiated the Add Other Network process.GIS 512 5.5.1.1*MY17 Driver Workload Restriction Items_9zHyobizEeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed

GIS520_EnergyUI.caldefSCHEDULE_UPDATE_TIMEOUT_TIMERLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALBIf a response is not received from the VICM within a Calibratable time (SCHEDULE_UPDAT E_TIMEOUT_TIMER) when updating the rate schedule, the CSM shall display the Schedule Update Timeout Pop-Up.GIS-520 Section 5.1.1.1_ZjSsYNswEea9hOtd-fbZ_Q3Integer 0101.0seconds3

GIS520_EnergyUI.caldefENERGYSUMMARY_MINIMUMPOPUP_DISPLAYTIMERLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALBIn the event that another request for the display is received immediately after the CSM launches the Energy Summary Exit Pop-Up, The Energy Summary Exit Pop-Up shall be displayed for a minimum of 2s to avoid being interpreted as a screen flicker. GIS521_AppshowUIWorkflow.caldefAppShopLaunchDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen triggered, the user is prohibited from launching the AppShop app views (e.g. Home Screen / AppTray / Notification drawer, when applicable). The feature restricted quick notice should be shown in this case (reference GIS?500) if the user is already in the Appshop show quick notice and go to the home screen.GIS 521 DRIVER WORKLOAD RESTRICTIONS OVERVIEW_MNNLsLi2EeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS521_AppshowUIWorkflow.caldefAppTabAccessDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen triggered, the user is prohibited from accessing the App tab. If the App tab is pressed, the feature restricted quick notice (reference GIS?500) is shown. If the user is already in the App tab, the quick notice is shown and the system should switch to the homescreen.GIS 521 DRIVER WORKLOAD RESTRICTIONS OVERVIEW_MAC5cbi2EeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS521_AppshowUIWorkflow.caldefMyAppsTabAccessDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen triggered, the user is prohibited from accessing the MyApps tab. If the MyApps tab is pressed, the feature restricted quick notice (reference GIS?500) is shown and the system should exit the AppShop. If the user is already in the MyApps tab, show quick notice and go to the home screen.GIS 521 DRIVER WORKLOAD RESTRICTIONS OVERVIEW_Ll9lgbi2EeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS521_AppshowUIWorkflow.caldefServiceTabAccessDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen triggered, the user is prohibited from accessing the Services tab. If the Services tab is pressed, the feature restricted quick notice (reference GIS?500) is shown. If the user is already in the Services tab, the quick notice is shown and the system should go to the home screen.GIS 521 DRIVER WORKLOAD RESTRICTIONS OVERVIEW_LxQPgbi2EeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS521_AppshowUIWorkflow.caldefServicePurchaseIntentFromOtherAppDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen triggered, the user is prohibited from accessing the AppShop view. The feature restricted quick notice should be shown (reference GIS?500)GIS 521 DRIVER WORKLOAD RESTRICTIONS OVERVIEW_EbSukLi2EeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS524_TermsAndConditionsDriverWorkload.caldefLearnMoreScreensDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen the user taps on the Learn More button, they would be shown the lockout popup. GIS-524 5.5.1.1*Driver Workload Restriction Items_-fLKoJ8qEea-Ao5FQchwtQ1Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS524_TermsAndConditionsDriverWorkload.caldefTermsDetailDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen the user taps on the Accept Terms button, they would be shown the lockout popup. GIS-524 5.5.1.1*Driver Workload Restriction Items_1qFZQJ8qEea-Ao5FQchwtQ1Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS524_TermsAndConditionsDriverWorkload.caldefViewingTermsDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen the user taps on the View Terms button, they would be shown the lockout popup. If the user is currently viewing the terms, those screens would be exited, the user would see the lockout pop-up, and after dismissing, or a 10 second timeout then the user would be taken to the screen that was active prior to invoking the terms acceptance view.GIS-524 5.5.1.1*Driver Workload Restriction Items_7VhncLi2EeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS525_AuthenticatorDriverWorkloads.caldefPasswordEntryDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUWhen enabled, user is prohibited from entering their password. If the user is viewing the password entry keyboard screen and press on a key, the feature restricted popup (see GIS-500) is shown. After dismissing, the user is returned to the keyboard view. If the user taps on a button that would normally take them to the password entry screen (Token expired ongoing notification in the notification drawer), the feature restricted pop-up is shown.GIS 525 5.4.1.1*MY17 Driver Workload Restriction Items_RgTnkbi3EeSxl78x5qydAw2Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS525_AuthenticatorDriverWorkloads.caldefExpiredNotificationDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUIf the token expired notification is shown to the user and this is triggered, the notification is removed from the screen.GIS 525 5.4.1.1*MY17 Driver Workload Restriction Items_MTXBkLi3EeSxl78x5qydAw3Enumeration     VehicleStopped
GIS525_AuthenticatorUI.caldefGM_Account_Sign_In_MethodMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUCalibration to allow the use of phone number to sign in to a GM account in addition to email.GIS-525_UO4ncIasEeWDt9_8652oNQ1Enumeration     Email_Only
GIS538_MyModeUI.caldefSettingsDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUIf lockout behavior is triggered, the user is prohibited from enetering settings and will see the system lockout notification.GIS-538 10.1.1.1 Driver Workload Restriction Items_mtQg4NxwEea9hOtd-fbZ_Q1Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS538_MyModeUI.caldefKeyboardInputDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUIf lockout behavior is triggered, the user is prohibited from entering characters into TeleNav.GIS-538 10.1.1.1 Driver Workload Restriction Items_cA128NxvEea9hOtd-fbZ_Q1Enumeration     MediumSpeed
GIS538_MyModeUI.caldefDisclaimerDriverWorkloadMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUIf lockout behavior is triggered, the user is prohibited from viewing the disclaimer.GIS-538 10.1.1.1 Driver Workload Restriction Items_cUUegNxtEea9hOtd-fbZ_Q1Enumeration     MediumSpeed

GIS539_TrailerAppUI.caldefMaintenanceRemind_MeMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUThis cal is used to determine how often the Maintenance Due Notification is displayed based on ignition counts. Upon reaching the reminder number, the notification shall be displayed on the next ignition cycle. GIS-539 & GIS-739_zxCooC8LEeaOBpLH5QxSHQ1Integer 02551.0none30
GIS539_TrailerAppUI.caldefTraileringAppTypeLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThis calibration turns the Trailering App app on or off on the home screen for light or heavy duty truck in North American Region. This cal is used to determine trailering functionality available on the vehicle. If set to 0, trailer app is disabled. If set to 1, trailer app contains Trailer Light Sequence functionality only. Option selected when Trailering Interface Module is NOT packaged on the vehicle (RPO U1D is NOT packaged). If set to 2, trailer app contains full Trailering Features. Option selected when Trailering Interface Module is packaged on the vehicle (RPO U1D is packaged) GIS-539 & GIS-739_1ucVoHKvEeWtPcYjqrxpUw4Enumeration     Disabled
GIS549_MultifunctionInfotainmentController.caldefKeyboard_Cursor_ControlMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUThis defines the path of the cursor on a keyboard row as the primary rotary control is rotated either clockwise or counterclockwise.GIS-549 Calibration Section_zAfaUKN0EeevVeh3fF_jdg1Enumeration     CalibrationA
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalA.caldefWindshield_SymbolLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALA,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines which Windshield Symbol to be displayed in the Front Climate Screen and Climate Quick Status Pane for the Windshield Air Distribution Mode:  $00 - 3 Squiggly Arrows or  $01 - Single Arrow GIS-550_lWJtsEElEeaX676o0O3GfQ1Enumeration     Three_Squiggly_Arrows
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalA.caldefDefrost_LabelLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALA,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines which Defrost Label to be displayed in the Front Climate Screen and Climate Quick Status Pane:  $00 - ISO only,  $01 - Front plus ISO, or  $02 - MAX plus ISO. GIS-550_HOXQMEEkEeaX676o0O3GfQ1Enumeration     Max_Plus_ISO
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalA.caldefHvacRadioDisplayEnableLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALA,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines whether the Front Climate Screen is displayed or not. This includes whether a Climate Home Screen Icon and App Tray Icon are displayed. Note: The Climate Quick Status Pane continues to be shown regardless of the calibration; when set to $00, touching the Climate Quick Status Pane does nothing (Theme A Only).  $00 (Value = False) - Never display Front Climate Screen. Remove Front Climate Application from Home Screen and App Tray Porch view (Theme A) information will be populated from communicated QSP data. If Rear Climate is enabled, show single tab layout for the Rear Climate Application.  $01 (Value = True) - Front Climate Screen is enabled. Front Climate Application on Home Screen and App Tray will be present, Porch view (Theme A) information will be populated from communicated QSP data. If Rear Climate is enabled show the Dual tab layout for both the Front Climate and Rear Climate Applications. 5.1.1.1*MY17 Global A Architecture Calibration Items_qiKCEG7iEeSssq_awwoZ3g2Boolean     true
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalA.caldefRearHvacRadioDisplayEnableLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALA,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines whether the Rear Climate Screen is displayed or not. This includes whether a Rear Climate Home Screen Icon and the Rear Climate tab in the Climate Application is displayed.  $00 (Value = False) - Never display Rear Climate Screen. Remove Rear Climate Application from Home Screen and App Tray, if (but most likely not) applicable (determined by GIS-501).  $01 (Value = True) - Rear Climate Screen is enabled. There is a Rear Climate Home Screen Icon and the Front Climate is enabled show the Dual tab layout for both the Front Climate and Rear Climate Applications.5.1.1.1*MY17 Global A Architecture Calibration Items_tjOmYG7iEeSssq_awwoZ3g2Boolean     false
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalA.caldefAirDistributionModeLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALA,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines whether the Front Climate Screen displays the 4-Mode or Combi Air Distribution display and adjustment elements.  $00 - display 4-Mode scheme  $01 - display Combi scheme5.1.1.1*MY17 Global A Architecture Calibration Items_DP17ALipEeSxl78x5qydAw2Enumeration     DisplayCombiScheme
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalA.caldefRearAirDistributionModeLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALA,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines whether the Rear Climate Screen displays the 3-Mode or Combi Air Distribution display and adjustment elements.  $00 - display 3-Mode scheme  $01 - display Combi scheme5.1.1.1*MY17 Global A Architecture Calibration Items_MINp4LipEeSxl78x5qydAw2Enumeration     DisplayCombiScheme
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalB.caldefMIN_UPDATE_TIMELOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUThe Min Update Time ensures that the request can be seen by the recipient of the signal, before it is overwritten by the next request.GIS-550 Section 5.1.1.2*MY18 Global B Architecture Calibration Items_nvzPEP8PEeeDo-Dq14by9g1Integer 102001.0milliseconds100
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalB.caldefMaximum_FanSpeedLOW,MID,HIGH,GEM,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines the maximum fan speed the vehicle is capable of in a 0-12 value for Front and Rear Climate. If the vehicle is only capable of fan speeds up to 8 we can use this calibration to make 8 the new 100% within the fan speed HMI displays.GIS-550 Section 5.1.1.2*MY18 Global B Architecture Calibration Items_6Nd3UOZwEeen_5uNNn90GA1Integer 0121.0none12
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalB.caldefClimate_QuickStatusPane_DisplayLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines whether the Front Climate Quick Status Pane is displayed or not. The BCM will always send data, at which point that it is determined that a vehicle has too little content to display to a customer this calibration should be set to FALSE.  FA LSE - Front Climate Quick Status Pane not shown to the user upon receipt of Climate data from the BCM.  TRUE - Front Climate Quick Status Pane is shown to the user upon receipt of Climate data from the BCM.GIS-550_m5S78NwnEea9hOtd-fbZ_Q1Boolean     true
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalB.caldefWindshield_Symbol_GlobalBLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines which Windshield Symbol to be displayed in the Front Climate Screen and Climate Quick Status Pane for the Windshield Air Distribution Mode:  $00 - 3 Squiggly Arrows or  $01 - Single Arrow GIS-550_kEcIcJ__Eea-Ao5FQchwtQ1Enumeration     Three_Squiggly_Arrows
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalB.caldefDefrost_Label_GlobalBLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines which Defrost Label to be displayed in the Front Climate Screen and Climate Quick Status Pane:  $00 - ISO only,  $01 - Front plus ISO, or  $02 - MAX plus ISO. GIS-550_Kn-3kEFJEeaX676o0O3GfQ1Enumeration     Max_Plus_ISO
GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalB.caldefRear_Climate_Application_AvailableLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines whether the Rear Climate Screen is displayed or not. This includes whether a Rear Climate Home Screen Icon is displayed. This is Infotainment internal and is declared in Control Device and consumed:  FALSE - Never display Rear Climate Screen. Remove Rear Climate from APP list or  TRUE - Rear Climate Screen is enabled. There is a Rear Climate Home Screen Icon. GIS-550_yyBlgEE8EeaX676o0O3GfQ1Boolean     false

GIS-550_B-QUkEE8EeaX676o0O3GfQ1Boolean     false

GIS-550_b1gb4EE7EeaX676o0O3GfQ1Boolean     false

GIS-550_5ZprsEE6EeaX676o0O3GfQ1Enumeration     None

GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalB.caldefNumber_of_Rear_Temp_ZonesLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines whether the Rear Climate Screen displays Dual Zone, Single Zone, or NO rear set temperature values:  0 - No Rear Temp Zone,  1 - Single Front Zone, or  2 - Dual Front Zone. GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalB.caldefKe_b_SZ_leftTempIndLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines on which side of the display the Single Zone set temperature display and controls should be shown:  TRUE - Display Single Zone set temperature display and controls (if applicable) NOT on the right side of the screen (left side or middle is OK).  FALSE - Display Single Zone set temperature display and controls (if applicable) NOT on the left side of the screen (right side only is OK). GIS550_ClimateTouchScreenUI_GlobalB.caldefClimate_Application_AvailableLOW,MID,HIGH,GLOBALB,ENTRY_VCU,VCUDetermines whether the Front Climate Screen is displayed or not. This includes whether a Climate Home Screen Icon and the Climate Porch Pane is displayed. This is Infotainment internal and is declared in Control Device and consumed as common cal in Display Devices.  FALSE - Never display Front Climate Screen. Remove Front Climate Application from Home Screen and App Tray; Porch view (Theme A Only) information will be populated from communicated QSP data. If Rear Climate is enabled, show single tab layout for the Rear Climate Application.  TRUE - Front Climate Screen is enabled. Front Climate Application on Home Screen and App Tray will be present; Porch view (Theme A Only) information will be populated from commuicated QSP data. If Rear Climate is enabled show the Dual tab layout for both the Front Climate and Rear Climate Applications.GIS-550_cgTxkEEpEeaX676o0O3GfQ2Boolean     true

GIS582_Speech_Recognition_Screen_Flows.caldefSR_ENABLE_STATIC_TEXT_DISPLAYMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUIs the system to display Speech Recognition screen 'Static' text on the CSM and/or Cluster displays, or just images and dynamic text? If Static text is NOT allowed (for a language) on the display, then the static screen text does not need to be localized for the language. If static text is disabled for a language, then only dynamic text from list screens (like NBEst lists and Disambiguation lists) will be displayed. Other screens will only show icons indicating the SR session state for listening window. Static text allowed on neither display = 0, Static text allowed on CSM = 1, Static text allowed on Cluster = 2, Static text allowed on Both = 3. GIS582_Speech_Recognition_Screen_Flows.caldefSR_Min_Inter_Prompt_TimeMID,HIGH,GLOBALA,GLOBALB,VCUThe recognition feedback prompt will not be played before a minimum inter-prompt delay expires after the processing prompt.
